subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #024 Pentecost
subcodes.first_line: The descent of the Holy Spirit is not like the entrance of air into the human body.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این حلول روح القدس نه مثل حلول هوا در جوف انسان است این تعبیر و تشبیه است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @Manifestation of God as mirror
